name: Anhui Xinbo Aluminum Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Xinbo Aluminum Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells aluminum alloy profiles. It offers aluminum products in the areas of rail, new energy photovoltaic, car lightweight, electronic appliances, medical and electrical appliances, energy-efficient buildings, system doors and windows, and other fields. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in Tianchang, China.
